subject: Fermi  trigger No 644155206: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin,

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-IAC robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Spain (IAC Teide Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB210531.50 (trigger No 644155206,09h 03m 09.60s , +03d 31m 12.0s, R=1) errorbox  31477 sec after notice time and 31529 sec after trigger time at 2021-05-31 20:45:30 UT, with upper limit up to  18.9 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenith distance = 53 deg. The sun  altitude  is -10.7 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = 31 deg., longitude l = 226 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1625124

We obtain a following upper limits.
